Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Magic Tower]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The Magic Tower is a vertical city and a school.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The Magic Tower is a polished steel spire that pierces the clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The narrator is bound to the Magic Tower on something like parole.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Magic Tower has a teacher's dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Magic Tower has a reputation that can protect students.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — The Magic Tower has manicured lawns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Corporations are not permitted to operate within a system of the Magic Tower without special exemption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Magic Tower is a location where ships can be picked up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — The Magic Tower is a location with Sunsail ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — The Magic Tower is a location that has political reach within the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — Varic Vallenar requested the help of the Magic Tower against the Iron Legion.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The Magic Tower assumes wizards can achieve significant results in both water elementalism and binding magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — The Magic Tower is a location where Omega attacked Varic Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — The narrator has students from the Magic Tower.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The Magic Tower has students who are growing impatient.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The Magic Tower is an organization or location from which Mariala Brechess originates.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Magic Tower is led by a First Director who is an enigmatic Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Magic Tower has a First Director.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — The Magic Tower is an institution of the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The Magic Tower's First Director visited Dornoth Four last week.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Magic Tower has provided full support to Planetary Security.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Magic Tower is working against the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — The Magic Tower provides class lists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — The Magic Tower has policies regarding student information.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
